title: 'America recovered 4 ALIEN species...': Ex-CIA insider drops explosive UFO claim, 'they weren’t human'
Not a big reveal: Apollo 'UFO' images have been public for decades
Not a big reveal: Apollo 'UFO' images have been public for decades
description: Much of the UFO imagery that the Pentagon released last week was new, but we've known for decades about the odd things that the Apollo astronauts saw on and around the moon.
